SourceProxy.label: SHYX Edge Collapse (CGAL)
SourceProxy.name: SHYXEdgeCollapse

Documentation.short_help: Surface mesh simplification with CGAL edge_collapse.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Triangulated surface mesh simplification using CGAL::Surface_mesh_simplification::edge_collapse and Edge_count_ratio_stop_predicate. Simplification stops when the ratio of current to initial undirected edge count falls below Edge Count Ratio (same meaning as the CGAL surface mesh simplification example). Input must be a pure triangle mesh; use Triangulate upstream for mixed cells. Cost strategy selects CGAL get_cost / get_placement (Lindstrom-Turk, Garland-Heckbert plane QEM, or edge length with midpoint placement).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: EdgeCountRatio
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Edge Count Ratio (stop)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Stop when (current edges) / (initial edges) is strictly below this value. Default 0.5: stop when current undirected edge count falls below half of the initial count (same predicate as the CGAL example, different threshold).

IntVectorProperty.name: CostStrategy
IntVectorProperty.label: Cost Strategy

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, point/cell data are probed from the input onto the simplified mesh.
